args.code: (async () => { try { const resp=await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:8787/store-assets/play/icon-512.png'); if(!resp.ok) return 'HTTP '+resp.status; const blob=await resp.blob(); const file=new File([blob],'icon-512.png',{type:'image/png'}); const dt=new DataTransfer(); dt.items.add(file); const inp=document.querySelector('input[type=file]'); inp.files=dt.files; inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2500)); return JSON.stringify({files: inp.files.length, blobBytes: blob.size}); } catch(e){ return 'ERR: '+e.message; } })()
